onboarding.title: Welcome to Twofer
onboarding.subtitle: Choose how we find deals near you.
onboarding.introBody: Twofer shows live offers from nearby businesses. Save places you like, claim in one tap, and keep tickets in your wallet.
onboarding.locationBody: We use your general area to sort nearby deals and improve alerts. You can switch to ZIP later in Settings.
onboarding.zipBody: We’ll use your 5-digit ZIP to estimate your area for distance and alerts.
onboarding.locationDenied: Location wasn’t shared. You can enter a ZIP code instead.
onboarding.locationError: Couldn’t read your location. Try ZIP or Settings later.
onboarding.zipGeocodeFail: We couldn’t find that ZIP. Check the code and try again.
onboarding.zipInvalidFormat: Enter a valid 5-digit US ZIP code.
onboarding.zipLookupFail: We couldn’t look up that ZIP right now. Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.shopsSubtitle: We'll show their deals first and alert you when they post.
onboarding.shopsEmpty: No shops nearby yet — you can add favorites anytime.
onboarding.radiusBody: We’ll prioritize deals within this distance. You can still browse everything.
onboarding.notifyBody: Get a heads-up when new deals go live near you. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.favoriteHint: Favorite shops to hear when they post a deal.

dealQuality.strongDealMessage: Twofer deals need to be at least 40% off or give something free. Try buy one, get one free or buy a coffee, get a muffin free.

blocks.TITLE_SHORT: Title is too short — customers need to see the value right away. Try something like 2-for-1 lattes or Free muffin with any coffee.
blocks.MULTI_PERCENT: Multiple discounts can confuse customers. Pick one clear headline: buy one, get one free, or a single strong percentage.
blocks.BELOW_THRESHOLD: Deals under 40% off won't stand out. Try buy one, get one free, or bump the discount to 40%+.
blocks.CLARIFY_VALUE: Spell out the value — e.g. free drink with any sandwich or 2 for $10. Customers should get it at a glance.

strongGuard.conditional: Buy X + % off Y deals don't qualify. Try making the second item free instead!
strongGuard.low_percent: Discounts under 40% won't attract enough foot traffic. Try buy one, get one free, or at least 40% off.
strongGuard.no_strong_language: Make it irresistible! Try buy one, get one free, a free item with purchase, or 40%+ off.

dealDraft.unsavedBody: You have unsaved deal details. Leave without saving?

dealEligibility.invalidBody: Finish the required offer rules before choosing schedule and generating an ad.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account?
deleteAccount.body: Starts deletion review. Can remove your login, business profile, offers, redemptions, and analytics.
deleteAccount.bodyConsumer: Starts deletion review. Can remove your login, shopper profile, saved places, tickets, and history.
deleteAccount.finalBusinessBody: Final warning: deleting your account permanently removes your Twofer login. If you created a business, its profile, live offers, past offers, related claims, redemptions, and analytics history are also removed. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.finalConsumerBody: Final warning: deleting your account permanently removes your Twofer login, shopper profile, saved places, claimed tickets, and redemption history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.errFailed: We could not delete your account. Try again or contact support.
deleteAccount.sectionBody: Permanently deletes account, business data, offers, redemptions, and analytics. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.sectionBodyConsumer: Permanently deletes shopper account, saved places, tickets, and history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.ownershipAmbiguousBlockedBody: We couldn’t confirm whether your account is linked to a business. To delete your login safely, contact support.
deleteAccount.fallbackWebHint: If in-app deletion isn’t available or doesn’t work, you can request account deletion on our website.
deleteAccount.fallbackWebBody: You can complete or request account deletion on our website.

merchantInsights.repeatVisits: Confirmed repeat customers: {{repeat}} of {{total}} redeemers came back
merchantInsights.hourHeat: Claims by hour (local to each deal)
merchantInsights.hourHeatSparse: Not enough claims yet for a clear hourly pattern.

createAi.loginPrompt: Please log in to create deals.
createAi.needBusiness: Create a business to use AI ad ideas.
createAi.intro: Add a photo or describe the item. We'll draft the ad.
createAi.devToolsIntro: Optional checks for ad drafting. Use the main Generate ad button for normal publishing.
createAi.devCreateConfirmMsg: This creates a real draft. Use normal publishing for customer-ready deals.
createAi.qaHelp: Optional label for internal review. Leave blank for normal use.
createAi.photoHint: Add a clear photo of the dish, drink, or item—AI uses it to stay accurate.
createAi.photoSkipHint: No photo right now? Skip this and describe the item in Step 2.
createAi.photoSkippedBanner: No photo selected. Describe the deal and Twofer will use those details.
createAi.dealDescriptionHelpWithPhoto: Add the item, offer, and any limits so the ad stays accurate.
createAi.dealDescriptionHelpNoPhoto: No photo? Type the item, the offer, and any details customers should know.
createAi.hintPlaceholderNoPhoto: Example: 2-for-1 latte, today only, house vanilla latte
createAi.scheduleHelp: Choose when customers can claim this deal. Run it once or repeat it weekly. Deals run up to 4 hours at a time.
createAi.errMaxDuration: Deals can run for up to {{hours}} hours at a time. Shorten the end time.
createAi.slowHoursNudge: Best for filling slower times — try your slow-hours preset under Recurring.
createAi.slowHoursNudgeManual: Tip: target the times you actually want more customers. Slower hours work best.
createAi.refreshLimitReached: You've revised this ad enough times — start fresh with a new offer.
createAi.generatingHint: Writing your ad and preparing the image. This can take up to 90 seconds.
createAi.generatingHintNoPhoto: Writing your ad and creating a matching image. This can take up to 90 seconds.
createAi.generatingWithPhoto: Researching the item, writing copy, and polishing your photo...
createAi.photoPolishTitle: How should we polish your photo?
createAi.photoPolishHelp: Studio polish is recommended — costs about the same as generating a new photo, and uses your real product.
createAi.customImageEditPlaceholder: Warmer lighting, fewer crumbs, softer background...
createAi.originalPhotoAckLabel: I reviewed this photo and want to use it as the final ad image.
createAi.originalPhotoAckHelper: Twofer will publish this original photo as selected.
createAi.localizedApprovalDisclosure: This preview changes only the customer-facing language. The deal mechanics, image, schedule, and inventory stay tied to the same approved offer.
createAi.imageRestoredBanner: Image restored. Review and approve the ad before publishing.
createAi.adAccepted: Ad selected - review below before publishing
createAi.publishMissingBody: Add a headline and offer details before publishing.
createAi.publishValidationBody: Fix the deal details above, then publish again.
createAi.publishReadyBody: Review the details, then publish when you are ready.
createAi.publishUpdateReadyBody: Review the details, then save your live deal changes.
createAi.publishBusyBody: We're making your deal live. Please wait.
createAi.publishSuccessBody: Your deal is now live for customers.
createAi.publishUpdateSuccessBody: Your live deal has been updated.
createAi.reviseFeedbackPlaceholder: Change the top headline; make it clearer and shorter...
createAi.reviseSuggestionTopHeadlineFeedback: Change the top headline so it sounds like a real ad based on the full offer.
createAi.reviseSuggestionShorterFeedback: Make the copy shorter and clearer without changing the offer.
createAi.reviseSuggestionWarmerFeedback: Make the wording warmer and more inviting while keeping the offer facts exact.
createAi.reviseSuggestionNewImageFeedback: Try a different image angle with cleaner composition and no text in the image.
createAi.revisingCopyHint: Using your comment to change the visible wording while keeping the offer facts locked.
createAi.revisingImageHint: Using your comment as visual direction. Offer text stays rendered by the app.
createAi.revisingBothHint: Using your comment to refresh the wording and visual while preserving the deal facts.
createAi.reviseErrPickSomething: Describe what to change before revising.
createAi.reviseSuccessBoth: AI updated the wording and image.
createAi.reviseErrUnchanged: AI returned the same ad. Edit your comment and try again.
createAi.reviseLimitBody: No revisions left for this ad. Edit the deal text below, or generate a fresh ad.
createAi.errMicPermission: Microphone permission is required for voice input.
createAi.errRecordingStart: Could not start recording. Try again.
createAi.transcribeDone: Voice transcribed and added to your description.
createAi.transcribeCooldown: Please wait a moment before recording again.
createAi.transcribeFailed: Couldn't read the voice note. Try again.
createAi.quotaRemaining: {{remaining}} of {{limit}} AI uses left this month
createAi.quotaWarning: Only {{remaining}} AI uses remaining this month.
createAi.prefillFromReuse: Deal prefilled from your past deals.
createAi.prefillFromHub: Deal prefilled. Add a photo and generate your ad!
createAi.errUnexpectedAiResponse: We couldn't prepare an ad. Try again.
createAi.errImageGenerationNoImage: AI couldn't create an image for this ad. Add a photo or try again before using it.
createAi.errImageServiceDown: Our image service is busy right now. Try again in a few minutes, or add your own photo.
createAi.offerMechanicsInvalid: Your offer setup doesn't match this deal type. Check what the customer buys, the free item, and the offer rule above, then try again.
createAi.fallbackIntro: We couldn’t generate ads right now. You can still finish this offer manually.
createAi.fallbackBody: Your photo and offer note are saved. Fill in the headline, short line, button text, and details below, or adjust the note and generate again.
createAi.manualDraftBanner: Manual editor opened. Add a headline and offer details, then publish when it looks right.
createAi.pickAdHelp: Choose the angle that fits your shop, then edit before publishing.
createAi.copyStrategyReasonValueClarity: Leads with the deal so the value is obvious at a glance.
createAi.copyStrategyReasonSocialOccasion: Frames the offer around a real customer moment.
createAi.copyStrategyReasonProductDesire: Makes the item feel worth choosing without changing the offer.
createAi.copyStrategyReasonLocalDiscovery: Gives nearby customers a simple reason to stop in.
createAi.copyStrategyReasonMerchantSpecific: Uses what is known about this business without inventing facts.
createAi.copyStrategyReasonDefault: A distinct AI-written angle for the same locked offer.
createAi.variantListingBodyLabel: Full listing text (what shoppers see under your headline)
createAi.variantNeedsPhotoForPreview: Add a photo above to preview your ad with the image.
createAi.errLoadDeal: Couldn’t load this deal. Go back and try again.
createAi.menuOfferScheduleHint: Set when this offer runs below — one-time dates or a recurring weekly window — then generate ads and publish.
createAi.errPhotoPicker: Photo picker did not open. Try Take photo, check photo access in Settings, or describe the item below.
createAi.errMaxClaims: Max claims must be greater than 0.
createAi.errCutoff: Cutoff buffer must be 0 or more.
createAi.errEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
createAi.errRecurringDay: Select at least one day for recurring deals.
createAi.errRecurringWindow: Recurring window start must be before end.
createAi.errAddHint: Please add a few words about the deal.
createAi.errRegenClientLimit: You have used the free refreshes for this draft. Tap Generate ad for a fresh version, or edit the text below.
createAi.errCustomImageEditRequired: Describe the custom photo edit, or choose a preset polish option.
createAi.errOriginalPhotoAckRequired: Check the original-photo acknowledgement before publishing.
createAi.errUnexpectedAi: Unexpected response from AI. Try again.
createAi.successBatchNew: Fresh ad ready. Review it, refine it, or edit before publishing.
createAi.successBatchFirst: Ad ready. Review it, refine it, or edit before publishing.
createAi.errPublishDraft: Please generate or enter title and description.
createAi.errPublishDraftFirst: Please generate or enter title and description first.
createAi.errHeadlineContradictsOffer: Your headline or subheadline doesn't match this deal's locked offer facts. Update the wording so it fits the offer, then publish again.
createAi.errPublishPermission: Log in with the owner account for this business.
createAi.errPublishPhoto: Couldn't upload that photo. Try a new one.
createAi.errPublishNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
createAi.errPublishTranslation: Couldn't prepare the language versions for this deal. Try again.
createAi.errPublishInvalidOfferDefinition: The offer details are incomplete or inconsistent. Review the deal type, item, discount, location, and schedule.
createAi.errPublishInvalidAdSpec: The ad preview did not pass publish checks. Generate again or use a safer layout.
createAi.errPublishInvalidPosterSpec: The poster ad preview did not match the locked deal terms. Switch to Standard card or generate the poster again.
createAi.errPublishMissingPreviewApproval: Approve the exact ad preview again before publishing.
createAi.errPublishMissingLocalizationApproval: Approve the exact multilingual preview again before publishing.
createAi.errPublishVersionUnavailable: The server is missing the latest publish setup. This needs the OfferVersion migration before this ad can go live.
createAi.errPublishBillingSuspended: Billing for this location is suspended. Restore billing before publishing.
createAi.errPublishVerificationRequired: This business location must be verified before publishing.
createAi.generationOwnershipBody: This account cannot create or publish ads for this business. Log in with the owner account to continue.
createAi.generationQuotaBody: AI generation is paused for this account right now. You can write the ad yourself, or try AI again when it resets.
createAi.generationInputBody: Fix the account, photo, or deal details above, then try again.
createAi.generationNoFallbackBody: AI had trouble and there is no saved image to use for a fallback. Add a photo, try again, or write the ad yourself.
createAi.fallbackTemplateUnavailable: A fallback template is not available for this issue. Fix the message above, then try again.
createAi.friendlyOpenaiConfig: Ad help isn't available right now. You can still write your deal below.
createAi.friendlySession: Session expired. Log in again, then try generating.
createAi.friendlyPhoto: We couldn’t use that photo. Try taking or picking a new one.
createAi.friendlyRegenLimit: You have used the free refreshes for this draft. Tap Generate ad for a fresh version, or edit below.
createAi.friendlyRateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
createAi.friendlyGenerationRateLimit: We couldn’t generate ads right now. You can still finish this offer manually. The service may be busy — try again shortly or fill in the fields below.
createAi.friendlyGenerationLongError: We couldn’t generate ads right now. You can still finish this offer manually. Try again in a moment, or fill in the fields below.
createAi.friendlyMonthlyLimit: You’ve used all your AI ad generations this month. They reset on the 1st.
createAi.friendlyCopyFailed: We couldn't write your ad this time. Tap Generate ad to try again.
createAi.friendlyTimeout: The ad draft took too long. Check your connection and try again.
createAi.friendlyOwnership: We couldn’t confirm you own this business. Log in with the owner account, then try again.

billing.noCardRequired: Card required in secure Stripe Checkout
billing.trialDisclosureBody: You will not be charged today. After your trial ends on {{date}}, Twofer Business is $30/month per location, plus applicable taxes, unless you cancel before the trial ends.
billing.trialConsentLabel: I understand Twofer Business will automatically bill monthly after the free trial unless I cancel before {{date}}.
billing.trialConsentRequired: Acknowledge the automatic-billing terms before opening Checkout.
billing.trialAutoBillingReminder: Reminder: your trial ends on {{date}}. Twofer Business will automatically bill $30/month per location, plus applicable taxes, unless you cancel before the trial ends. Use Manage subscription to cancel or update payment.
billing.daysRemaining: {{days}} days left in your free trial
billing.hoursRemaining: {{hours}} hours left in your free trial
billing.paywallExpiredMessage: Your trial has ended. Reactivate your account to continue creating deals.
billing.pilotTrialBody: Your trial is active. Cancel before the trial ends to avoid the first $30/month per location charge, plus applicable taxes.
billing.subscribeChargedImmediately: Checkout starts a 30-day free trial with $0 due today and automatic monthly billing after the trial unless canceled.
billing.cancelAtPeriodEnd: Cancels at the end of this billing period
billing.cancelNowRefund: Cancel now and request first-payment refund
billing.refundEligibility: First paid charge may be refundable within seven calendar days.
billing.refundConfirmBody: If approved, Twofer will refund the first paid invoice, cancel this subscription immediately, and suspend new deal activity for this location. Existing claimed deals remain redeemable through their original expiration.
billing.errRefund: Couldn't request the refund. Open the billing portal or contact support.
billing.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Update your payment method to create or publish deals.
billing.locationSuspended: This location is suspended. You can still view history and redeem existing claims.
billing.recurringDealsPaused: Recurring deals remain paused until you reactivate them.
billing.reactivateSchedules: Review and reactivate schedules after payment recovery.
billing.additionalImageRevisionCredit: Each deal includes the first image and two AI image revisions; later successful revisions use one credit.
billing.noRollover: Unused credits do not roll over.
billing.claimsRemainRedeemable: Existing claims remain redeemable through their original expiration.
billing.purchaseUnavailable: Purchases are not available in the app right now.
billing.webOnlyStatus: Subscription status is shown here. Purchases are handled through the authenticated Twofer website.
billing.trialValueRecap: Keep publishing BOGO offers after your trial.

billing.errSubscribe: Unable to start checkout. Please try again.
billing.errLoadPricing: Couldn't load billing status. Try again.
billing.checkoutSyncDelayed: Checkout completed. Trial confirmation may take a moment while Stripe sends the verified webhook.

aiInsights.title: AI Insights
aiInsights.noSuggestions: No suggestions available yet — create a deal first!

aiInsights.fallbackFirstDealBody: Try one strong deal with a clear customer action and reward.

walkthrough.dashboardBody: This is your home base. See all your deals, track claims and redemptions, and monitor how your business is doing at a glance.
walkthrough.createBody: Launch buy-one-get-one deals in seconds. Set the offer, pick a schedule, and your deal goes live to nearby customers instantly.
walkthrough.trackBody: Watch redemptions roll in, see which deals work best, and use insights to keep customers coming back.
walkthrough.aiLoading: Generating a deal idea for you...

cafe.hint: Create a buy-one-get-one drink deal for a cafe or coffee shop.
